archimate:Representation.name: JSON-LD
archimate:Representation.documentation:
Description: JSON-LD (JSON for Linked Data) is a serialization format that enables the representation of linked data using JSON (JavaScript Object Notation). It allows for the integration of structured data from different sources on the web, facilitating interoperability and knowledge sharing across systems.
Publisher: W3C
Source: https://www.w3.org/TR/json-ld11/
LOST view: SV-Functional Architecture Principles
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/JSON-LDRepresentation
EIRA concept: eira:SolutionBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/JSON-LDRepresentation
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Realises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/DataRepresentation

properties.value: JSON-LD (JSON for Linked Data) is a serialization format that enables the representation of linked data using JSON (JavaScript Object Notation). It allows for the integration of structured data from different sources on the web, facilitating interoperability and knowledge sharing across systems.
